dependencies: Third-party managers for senior housing communities (Atria, Sunrise, Le Groupe Maurice)
Tenants for triple-net leased properties (Brookdale, Ardent, Kindred)
risks: Concentration risk with limited number of managers and tenants
Dependence on third-party managers for SHOP segment operations
Credit risk exposure to major tenants (Brookdale, Ardent, Kindred)
Labor cost increases and workforce shortages affecting managers and tenants
Supply chain disruptions for construction materials and labor

regulatory_risks: REIT qualification requirements under Internal Revenue Code Sections 856-860
Healthcare licensing and certificates of need (CON) requirements
Medicare and Medicaid reimbursement changes and funding reductions
Federal and state fraud and abuse laws (Anti-Kickback Statute, False Claims Act)
HIPAA data privacy and security regulations
State-specific healthcare facility regulations and licensing
California SB-525 minimum wage requirements for healthcare workers
UK Health and Social Care Act 2008 and Data Protection Act 2018
Tax law changes affecting interest deductibility (Canada)
Built-in gains tax on asset dispositions within five years of REIT conversion
Provider Relief Fund compliance and potential recoupment by HHS
State data privacy laws (CCPA, Texas Data Privacy and Security Act)
Potential federal legislation restricting REIT ownership of healthcare properties
